## reference · cwe top 25 most dangerous software weaknesses 2023

* The CWE Top 25 list highlights the most critical software weaknesses that can lead to vulnerabilities.
* The list is ranked based on a score that considers factors such as CVE frequency and exploitability.
* The top 25 weaknesses are:
	+ CWE-787: Out-of-bounds Write (Score: 63.72, CVEs in KEV: 70)
	+ CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') (Score: 45.54, CVEs in KEV: 4)
	+ CWE-89: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') (Score: 34.27, CVEs in KEV: 6)
	+ CWE-416: Use After Free (Score: 16.71, CVEs in KEV: 44)
	+ CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') (Score: 15.65, CVEs in KEV: 23)
	+ CWE-20: Improper Input Validation (Score: 15.50, CVEs in KEV: 35)
	+ CWE-125: Out-of-bounds Read (Score: 14.60, CVEs in KEV: 2)
	+ CWE-22: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') (Score: 14.11, CVEs in KEV: 16)
	+ CWE-352: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) (Score: 11.73, CVEs in KEV: 0)
	+ CWE-434: Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type (Score: 10.41, CVEs in KEV: 5)
	+ CWE-862: Missing Authorization (Score: 6.90, CVEs in KEV: 0)
	+ CWE-476: NULL Pointer Dereference (Score: 6.59, CVEs in KEV: 0)
	+ CWE-287: Improper Authentication (Score: 6.39, CVEs in KEV: 10)
	+ CWE-190: Integer Overflow or Wraparound (Score: 5.89, CVEs in KEV: 4)
	+ CWE-502: Deserialization of Untrusted Data (Score: 5.56, CVEs in KEV: 14)
	+ CWE-77: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection') (Score: 4.95, CVEs in KEV: 4)
	+ CWE-119: Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer (Score: 4.75, CVEs in KEV: 7)
	+ CWE-798: Use of Hard-coded Credentials (Score: 4.57, CVEs in KEV: 2)
	+ CWE-918: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) (Score: 4.56, CVEs in KEV: 16)
	+ CWE-306: Missing Authentication for Critical Function (Score: 3.78, CVEs in KEV: 8)
	+ CWE-362: Concurrent Execution using Shared Resource with Improper Synchronization ('Race Condition') (Score: 3.53, CVEs in KEV: 8)
	+ CWE-269: Improper Privilege Management (Score: 3.31, CVEs in KEV: 5)
	+ CWE-94: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') (Score: 3.30, CVEs in KEV: 6)
	+ CWE-863: Incorrect Authorization (Score: 3.16, CVEs in KEV: 0)
	+ CWE-276: Incorrect Default Permissions (Score: 3.16, CVEs in KEV: 0)

Sources: https://cwe.mitre.org/top25/archive/2023/2023_top25_list.html
